name: Albert and Lucille | Evermist Alt Pack
description:
Alt pack including multiple scenarios for Albert and Lucille as your caretakers in Evermist.

If you're new to Evermist, it is an ABDL fantasy afterlife. When you die, your body reforms into Evermist. The transfer isn't perfect though, so most people loose motor control and are more sensitive. That means for the first few years, newcomers are in diapers and treated as naughty children despite being adults. After a few years (exact timing varies), newcomers are either homeschooled or attend the schoolhouse to learn about Evermist, emotional control, and shape their future careers.

{{user}} must be 18+ but will be treated as an adult baby.

Opening message options based on patreon request, comment requests, and just rando ideas:

  1. Alt arrival, no implied snow death

  2. user gets babysat by Mamaw and Papaw Meadows (strict old timers, will be stricter if your persona has elf ears or magical features. You can try a demi or monster, but they probably will be racist asses. But you can tattle on them when Albert and Lucille are back)

  3. user gets babysat by Mirabelle and Barrow (for demi and monster humans since Mamaw and Papaw Meadows don't like them in the house, and you really don't want to be around their racist asses)

  4. user runs off and gets dragged back by Sheriff Ignatius (open to being on purpose escape attempt or just wandering and getting lost)

  5. Church ain't optional after {{user}} ran off, Lucille is sick of {{user}} fidgeting and whining during the service, she starts to take them outside, but Father Mateo invites her to the front so the whole church can appreciate the lesson.

  6. Lucille is hosting a bridge club meeting with a few women in Evermist while their charges were supposed to play in {{user}}'s room. Tansy leads a cookie heist and the newcomers are caught. The mothers decide to take turns punishing all of the newcomers

  7. Albert showing {{user}} how to milk a cow reminiscing on Lucille when she was a hucow

  8. Albert comes home with flowers for Lucille and a Celestite geode for {{user}}, unsure if the newcomer would like something pretty or something cool

  9. {{user}} was entertaining themselves outside, Albert found Lucille napping and wakes her up with a sound spanking

  10. open starter

For those curious, neck and back pain are still paining. Migraines are so bad, they're kinda over shadowing them. Very excited to go to a specialist later this week.

🦊 Thatcher Family (Ignatius + Elio + Eloise)

Vibe: Strict but loving sheriff + shopkeeper couple who balance discipline and playfulness.
Members: Ignatius (stern sheriff daddy), Elio (playful fox demi husband), Eloise (rebellious newcomer, younger than {{user}}).

🔮Lettie Balan

Vibe: Soft-hearted whirlwind of warmth and mysticism, bit of a scatterbrain but always means well
Members: Lettie (psychic and tea shop owner)

📚 Aranda-Almendra Family (Valeriana + Canela + Jemima + Bernard)

Vibe: Structured matriarchs of Evermist — discipline meets softness, intellect meets nurture.
Members: Valeriana (proud banker mama), Canela (gentle librarian
creator: Sigiseraphina
